title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.430 - SFC Wm. Brian Woods, Jr. Memorial Highway designated for portion of Highway 30 in Jefferson County
text:
227.430.  SFC Wm. Brian Woods, Jr. Memorial Highway designated for portion of Highway 30 in Jefferson County. — The portion of Missouri Highway 30 from State Route NN north three miles to one-tenth of a mile southwest of old Missouri 30 in Jefferson County shall be designated the "SFC Wm. Brian Woods, Jr. Memorial Highway".  The department of transportation shall erect and maintain appropriate signs designating such highway, with the cost to be paid for by private donations.
(L. 2011 S.B. 77 merged with S.B. 173)
